Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 21 

COV_CRITERIA 

LABEL: Part D Coverage Criteria - Indicator of Waiver of Part A Requirement 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the requirement that Part D beneficiaries be entitled to Medicare Part 
A is waived. 

The value will indicate whether beneficiaries with only Part B entitlement may enroll in the Part D plan 
benefit package. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
